title: stachys setifera subsp. setifera
intro: Stachys setifera subsp. setifera, also known as the Woolly Betony or Woolly Hedge Betony, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The medicinal properties of Stachys setifera subsp. setifera have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Stachys setifera subsp. setifera is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies for its purported healing properties.
